mapper.sql: inventory_match_code, description, match_warehouse_type_code, match_inventory_status, mathch_pre_rec_date, inventory_type_code, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, match_inventory_risk
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_inventory_match_config
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_inventory_match_config (inventory_match_code, description, match_warehouse_type_code, match_inventory_status, mathch_pre_rec_date, inventory_type_code, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, match_inventory_risk) values (#{inventoryMatchCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{matchWarehouseTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{matchInventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mathchPreRecDate,jdbcType=BIT}, #{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{matchInventoryRisk,jdbcType=BIT})

insert into dbo.ops_inventory_match_config
inventory_match_code,
description,
match_warehouse_type_code,
match_inventory_status,
mathch_pre_rec_date,
inventory_type_code,
delflag,
cre_time,
creator,
modify_time,
modifier,
match_inventory_risk,
#{inventoryMatchCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{description,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{matchWarehouseTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{matchInventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{mathchPreRecDate,jdbcType=BIT},
#{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{matchInventoryRisk,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_inventory_match_config
inventory_match_code = #{record.inventoryMatchCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{record.description,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
match_warehouse_type_code = #{record.matchWarehouseTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
match_inventory_status = #{record.matchInventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mathch_pre_rec_date = #{record.mathchPreRecDate,jdbcType=BIT},
inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
match_inventory_risk = #{record.matchInventoryRisk,jdbcType=BIT},

update dbo.ops_inventory_match_config set inventory_match_code = #{record.inventoryMatchCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{record.description,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, match_warehouse_type_code = #{record.matchWarehouseTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, match_inventory_status = #{record.matchInventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mathch_pre_rec_date = #{record.mathchPreRecDate,jdbcType=BIT}, inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, match_inventory_risk = #{record.matchInventoryRisk,jdbcType=BIT}

update dbo.ops_inventory_match_config
description = #{description,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
match_warehouse_type_code = #{matchWarehouseTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
match_inventory_status = #{matchInventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mathch_pre_rec_date = #{mathchPreRecDate,jdbcType=BIT},
inventory_type_code = #{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
match_inventory_risk = #{matchInventoryRisk,jdbcType=BIT},
where inventory_match_code = #{inventoryMatchCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_inventory_match_config set description = #{description,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, match_warehouse_type_code = #{matchWarehouseTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, match_inventory_status = #{matchInventoryStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mathch_pre_rec_date = #{mathchPreRecDate,jdbcType=BIT}, inventory_type_code = #{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, match_inventory_risk = #{matchInventoryRisk,jdbcType=BIT} where inventory_match_code = #{inventoryMatchCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
